author: Her

max_files.description: Maximum number of workspace files to summarize.

capabilities.description: Save the current actionable work plan into Her Desktop state.

goal.description: Concrete outcome this plan should make true.

request.description: Fallback planning request when a structured goal is not available.

risks.description: Known risks, trust concerns, or implementation cautions.

steps.description: Ordered plan steps. Each item can include title, status, and detail.

detail.description: Optional evidence, scope, or implementation note.

verification.description: Commands, UI checks, or service checks that should prove the plan.

capabilities.title: Save work plan

description: Read local context, summarize files, and prepare work plans with explicit approval.
name: Workspace
systemPromptAddendum: Workspace actions require user approval before file mutation or shell execution.
